transcript: Speaker A (AI): ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: I... relaxing. Speaker A (AI): I am relaxing ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಇನ್ನೂ ಸ್ಮೂತ್ ಆಗಿ I am just relaxing ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳ್ಬಹುದು. [You should say 'I am relaxing'. To make it smoother, you can also say 'I am just relaxing'.] Speaker B: ಓ ಹೌದಾ? ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು? [Oh really? How to learn English?] Speaker A (AI): ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 ಮಿನಿಟ್ಸ್ ಡೈಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. ಒಂದು ತಿಂಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Just practicing with me for 15 minutes daily is enough. You can learn English in one month.] Speaker B: ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತಾ? [Does this cost a lot?] Speaker A (AI): ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಒಂದು ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just one rupee. One crore people are learning English with me.] Speaker B: ಸೂಪರ್! ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Super! How to join?] Speaker A (AI): ಈಗಲೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.]
on_screen_text: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀಯಾ [What are you doing] I... relaxing I am relaxing ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು [should say] ಇನ್ನೂ ಸ್ಮೂತ್ ಆಗಿ [even smoother] I am just relaxing ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳ್ಬಹುದು [can also say] ಹೌದಾ English ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು [Really? What did you do over the weekend? I go to the beach and eat ice cream. Almost perfect but a small correction: I went to the beach and ate ice cream. ಖರ್ಚು ಆಗುತ್ತಾ [Does it cost?] MySivi Premium LIMITED TIME OFFER 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today 24/7 AI English Teacher 500+ Exercises and Lessons Unlimited Access ಕೇವಲ 1 ರೂ [Just 1 Rs] MySivi AI Speak English Start English Learning - MySivi 10M+ Downloads Install 1 ಕೋಟಿ+ ಡೌನ್‌ಲೋಡ್ಸ್ [1 Crore+ Downloads] ಸೂಪರ್ [Super] ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು [How to join?] MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI avatar corrects a man's English by the pool, promoting the MySivi app. She highlights that 15 minutes of daily practice can teach English in a month, offering a 3-day trial for ₹1. The ad ends with a call to download the app.
